title: OFSI General licence INT/2025/6279615
body: " OFSI General licence INT/2025/6279615 OFSI General licence INT/2025/6279615 Publication notice   On 20 May 2025, OFSI issued General Licence INT/2025/6279615 under regulation 64 of The Russia (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (“the Russia Regulations”) which allows for persons to make insurance premiums payments to the Deposit Insurance Agency. "
